entries.test: ErrorRecoveryHooks > config-driven disable > disabled context-window-limit-recovery -> no compaction on error
entries.diagnosis: Test bug: error-recovery hook tests created a git repo for every case even though the hook logic never depends on git metadata, which inflated runtime under parallel load and triggered timeout failures.
entries.fix_applied: Removed unnecessary git repository setup from the error-recovery test helper to cut per-case setup cost.

entries.test: ContextInjectionHooks > compaction-todo-preserver > todos re-injected on session.created
entries.diagnosis: Test bug: context-injection hook tests created a git repo for every case even though the scenarios only exercise injector logic, so the extra repository setup pushed the file toward timeout under parallel load.
entries.fix_applied: Removed unnecessary git repository setup from the context-injection test helper.

entries.test: delegate-task tools > BackgroundCancelTool > cancel pending task -> cancelled
entries.diagnosis: Test bug: delegate-task tool tests paid git repository setup on every case even though the tool initialization path only needs a project directory and config, which inflated runtime under parallel execution.
entries.fix_applied: Removed unnecessary git repository setup from the delegate-task test helper.

entries.test: tool.bash permissions > asks for external_directory permission when workdir is outside project
entries.diagnosis: Test bug: the bash test file combined unnecessary git setup with overly expensive truncation cases, so parallel load caused the file to time out before the permission case completed reliably.
entries.fix_applied: Removed unnecessary git repositories from bash tmpdirs, reduced truncation fixture sizes, and raised timeout only for the heavy truncation integration cases.

entries.test: DetectionCheckingHooks > empty-task-response-detector > delegate_task returns short content -> warning injected
entries.diagnosis: Test bug: detection-checking hook tests created a git repo for every case even though the hooks only inspect message and tool payloads, adding avoidable setup cost that caused timeout failures in parallel runs.
entries.fix_applied: Removed unnecessary git repository setup from the detection-checking test helper.

entries.diagnosis: Test bug: config tests still created git repositories for the remote well-known override scenarios even though config loading does not require git there, which added avoidable setup time to an already large file.
entries.fix_applied: Removed unnecessary git repository setup from the remote well-known config tests.

entries.diagnosis: Test bug: registry tests waited for dependency installation even when fixtures already provided local tool modules, and the external-dependency fixture still spent time in dependency readiness checks under parallel load.
entries.fix_applied: Stubbed dependency waiting inside registry tests and replaced the external dependency fixture with a local node_modules package stub.

entries.diagnosis: Regression uncovered during verification: snapshot tests bootstrapped a git repo with an empty commit and then a second commit for every case, so parallel execution pushed the file into timeout territory.
entries.fix_applied: Collapsed snapshot bootstrap to a single git init/add/commit sequence per fixture.
